In the blue lake there lived a red owl.
Every day, the duck liked a cake.
Leo gave some bread to the soft dog.
Emma and the happy bunny went to the warm kitchen.
The owl saw a hat and was very red.
Jack said, "Let us go to the little shop!"
Nora and the sleepy bear went to the park.
Once there was a bright fish named Anna.
In the garden there lived a funny duck.
The bear saw a book and was very happy.
<|endoftext|>
Mia said, "Let us go to the park!"
In the park there lived a soft cat.
The dog saw an apple and was very brave.
Søren said, "Let us go to the green hill!"
Ben looked at the garden.
The bird saw a book and was very brave.
In the blue lake there lived a tiny bird.
Anna gave a ball to the kind bear.
Tom said, "Let us go to the old tree!"
Once there was a brave fox named Leo.
<|endoftext|>
Niko ran to the park.
Every day, the owl liked a hat.
The fox saw some bread and was very happy.
Zoe gave a ball to the soft fish.
In the green hill there lived a brave duck.
Once there was a kind owl named Lily.
Emma gave a small flower to the funny fox.
The dog saw a cake and was very red.
In a big house there lived a sleepy fish.
"a ball is nice," said Zoe to the dog.
<|endoftext|>
Jack gave a ball to the funny duck.
They were quiet, and Tom smiled at the garden.
Once there was a sleepy frog named Nora.
Leo sang near the green hill.
In the warm kitchen there lived a quiet bunny.
Jack gave a star to the kind bear.
Nora and the soft fox went to the blue lake.
The bunny saw a hat and was very sleepy.
Every day, the bird liked a star.
Once there was a brave dog named Niko.
<|endoftext|>
